name: One Day We'll Talk About Today: The Series
original_name: Nanti Kita Cerita Tentang Hari Ini: The Series
overview: When two people walk in different paths, can the two of them still compromise? Maybe it will be answered as the time passes by. One Day We'll Talk About Today is a webseries presented by Toyota Indonesia.
